name: QA 1617
description:
PCP QA Test No. 1617

Exercise pmproxy logger REST API with key server.



Copyright (c) 2025 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404-container reproduce

testStage.description:
PCP QA Test No. 1617

Exercise pmproxy logger REST API with key server.



Copyright (c) 2025 Red Hat.  All Rights Reserved.



**To reproduce this test, please run:**

    build/ci/ci-run.py ubuntu2404-container reproduce
